stemHtml: An aircraft is climbing at a constant IAS close to V<sub>MO</sub> above FL230. What could the flight crew do to avoid accidentally exceeding M<sub>MO</sub>? The flight crew must...

options.a: decelerate past V<sub>S0</sub> to avoid exceeding M<sub>MO</sub>.
options.b: stop flying at a constant IAS and fly at a constant TAS.
options.c: stop flying at a constant IAS and fly at a constant Mach number.
options.d: accelerate past V<sub>MO</sub> to avoid exceeding M<sub>MO</sub>.
